news.t: Hartford Funds Launches Its First Options Overlay Strategy, Hartford Equity Premium Income ETF (HEMI)

holdings.infoBox: HEMI is an equity ETF with a total of 86 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.65%, Alphabet at 6.61%, Apple at 5.92%, Microsoft at 5.19%, and Amazon.com at 4.41%.

overview.description: The Hartford Equity Premium Income ETF (HEMI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of large-cap US stocks aiming for income and capital appreciation. To generate yields, the fund utilizes a laddered call writing strategy on the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY) or on the S&P 500 Index. HEMI was launched on Dec 17, 2025 and is issued by The Hartford.

data.title: Hartford Funds Launches Its First Options Overlay Strategy, Hartford Equity Premium Income ETF (HEMI)
data.text: WAYNE, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hartford Funds, a leading asset manager, today announced the launch of Hartford Equity Premium Income ETF (Cboe: HEMI), which combines a core U.S. equity portfolio with ca...
